prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline (14 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1 for the neutral species (cation: charge +1, mult 2; anion: charge −1, mult 2). Charges were partitioned via the Mulliken scheme. The geometry was the user-supplied aniline.xyz, not re-optimized at this level.

Key results:
- Most nucleophilic site: N1 (atom 1), f⁻ = 0.20452359
- Most electrophilic site: C3 (atom 3), f⁺ = 2.2975867 [headline value]
- Dual descriptor on C3: 2.2310153

Integrity: trustworthy = true. Both Fukui sum-to-1 conservation checks passed (sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f-) = 1.0000). No warnings were reported by the engine.

CLI invocation: cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz
Live log: fukui_20260702-192817.out
Plot: agent_call_02_plot.png
